name: Customer & Sales
description: How demand is captured, qualified, converted and retained.

name: Service & Support
description: How enquiries, complaints, returns and defects are received, owned and resolved.

name: Commerce & Fulfilment
description: How products are listed, ordered, picked, delivered and returned.

name: Finance Operations
description: The business process around money: quoting, invoicing, instalments, commission and payout. Process design, not accounting advice.

name: Operations & Governance
description: How work, assets, contracts, approvals, permissions and quality are controlled.

name: Marketing & Engagement
description: How campaigns, forms, bookings and nurture journeys connect to the sales process.
